div.div: Lab-07 — Backend remoto profesional: S3 (state) + DynamoDB (locking) + cifrado y migración

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 943px; height: 1px; padding-top: 82px; margin-left: 476px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #232F3E;

display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#232F3E, #bdc7d4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 378px; height: 1px; padding-top: 195px; margin-left: 702px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #558B2F;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#558B2F, #679546); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font:
S3 Backend
bucket = terraform-state-labs-<ACCT>
key = lab07/terraform.tfstate
encrypt = true (SSE-AES256)
versioning = Enabled (recuperación)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 658px; height: 1px; padding-top: 345px; margin-left: 702px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #1A237E;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#1A237E, #bfc7ff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font:
DynamoDB Lock Table
name = terraform-state-locks
hash_key = LockID (string)
billing_mode = PAY_PER_REQUEST
Garantiza que solo UN apply modifica el state a la vez.
El item LockID = digest del state lo crea Terraform al inicio.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 253, 231), rgb(24, 22, 4)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(251, 192, 45), rgb(120, 69, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 416px; height: 1px; padding-top: 452px; margin-left: 514px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #5D4037;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#5D4037, #c6ada5); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 235, 238), rgb(44, 27, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(198, 40, 40), rgb(255, 145, 145));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 416px; height: 1px; padding-top: 452px; margin-left: 964px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #B71C1C;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#B71C1C, #ff9c9c); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font:
Secuencia de un apply concurrente:
1. Dev A: PutItem en LockID → ✓ obtiene el lock
2. Dev B: PutItem en LockID → ✗ ConditionalCheckFailed
Terraform muestra: "Error acquiring the state lock"
3. Dev A: termina apply → DeleteItem (libera lock)
4. Dev B: reintenta y obtiene el lock
Sin DynamoDB: dos applies escriben tfstate en orden indeterminado → corrupción.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 325px; margin-left: 360px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #5C2EA0; background-color: #ffffff;

display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#5C2EA0, #cfa7ff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); white-space: nowrap;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1418px; height: 1px; padding-top: 725px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #555555;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#555555, #a4a4a4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font:
Backend remoto profesional — sustituye el archivo terraform.tfstate local por un state versionado, cifrado y con locking nativo. Habilita trabajo en equipo, recuperación ante errores (versionado S3) e imposibilita el race condition de dos applies concurrentes (DynamoDB).
Migración: terraform init -migrate-state copia automáticamente el tfstate local al backend remoto la primera vez (un solo paso, idempotente).

switch.text: Backend remoto profesional — sustituye el archivo terraform.tfstate local por un state versionado, cifrado y con locking nativo. Habilita trabajo en equipo, recuperación ante errores (versionado S3) e imposibilita el race condition de dos applies concurrentes...
